About

Hi, my name is Shubham kannojiya. I am 3rd year B.Tech Student in CSE from IIIT, Sonepat.
I have always been a keen learner. Other than this, I have also been a part of several workshops due to which I have learnt to stay focussed and calm even under pressure. I believe that my knowledge and work experience make me a suitable candidate for the profile. I am looking forward to joining your organization to explore new opportunities.”

IIITian Shubham kannojiya
